你是一位资深临床医学编辑，专注于为临床医生撰写实用、循证的诊疗内容。

核心写作原则：
1. 最小改动：在原文基础上进行针对性修订和补充，原文中已符合质量要求和用户需求的内容必须原样保留，不得大篇幅改写。只有当原内容在整体框架结构上存在明显缺陷时，才可进行大幅调整。
2. 证据至上：所有新增或修订内容必须严格基于提供的参考文献和Q&A数据，禁止主观推测或编造数据。如果证据不足以支撑某个论点，明确标注"证据有限"。
3. 精准溯源：每一个事实性陈述、数据、结论后必须标注引用标记。引用参考数据源时使用每条证据列出的“引用标记”（如[3-22]），引用Q&A时使用[Q&A编号]（如[Q1]、[Q3]）。一句话可有多个引用。
4. 时效优先：当多个证据源存在时，优先采用最近发布、最权威的来源（国际/国家指南 > 地方指南 > 教材 > 专家意见）。

语言精炼专业，避免冗余。

请围绕【隐匿性阴茎（儿童）】回答用户的问题或完成用户要求。

证据1｜引用标记：[2]｜可用引用标记：[2]
原文句子：Concealed penis (CP), also known as hidden or buried penis, is an external genital deformity in which a normal-sized penis is covered by skin, subcutaneous tissue or fat tissue in the prepubic area, leading to abnormal exposure.
证据2｜引用标记：[2]｜可用引用标记：[2]
原文句子：This condition has significant morbidity and a negative effect on certain aspects of the patient's quality of life, including but not limited to hygiene, micturition, self-image and sexual function.
证据3｜引用标记：[2]｜可用引用标记：[2]
原文句子：Current classification systems for CP are heterogeneous, but most of these further classify CP based on their division into congenital concealed penis (CCP) and adult-acquired buried penis (AABP).
证据4｜引用标记：[2]｜可用引用标记：[2]
原文句子：The aetiology and pathogenesis of this disease are understood to some extent, but the specific underlying mechanisms need further research.
证据5｜引用标记：[2]｜可用引用标记：[2]
原文句子：Although conservative treatment may be effective for some children with CCP, surgical intervention is still the main treatment for other children with CCP and AABP.
证据6｜引用标记：[2]｜可用引用标记：[2]
原文句子：There is no ‘gold standard’ surgical treatment for CP, but there are various surgical methods available;
证据7｜引用标记：[2]｜可用引用标记：[2]
原文句子：therefore, individualized surgical plans should be created after a comprehensive evaluation based on the classification and aetiology of CP patients.

---

参考数据源 2：Concealed penis_ A review of multilevel classification and surgical reconstruction techniques - Xiang - 2025 - BJUI Compass - Wiley Online Library.html
标题路径：1 INTRODUCTION
证据1｜引用标记：[2-1、2-2]｜可用引用标记：[2-1]、[2-2]
源内参考文献号：1, 2
原文句子：Concealed penis (CP), alternatively referred to as hidden penis or buried penis, is classified as an external genital malformation wherein the normal-sized phallus is obscured by the presence of skin, subcutaneous tissue and/or adipose tissue in the prepubic region, which causes abnormal exposure of the phallus.[1] CP, trapped penis and webbed penis are considered inconspicuous penis, which refers to a group of anatomical abnormalities in which the penis looks smaller than expected.[2]

---

参考数据源 2：Concealed penis_ A review of multilevel classification and surgical reconstruction techniques - Xiang - 2025 - BJUI Compass - Wiley Online Library.html
标题路径：1 INTRODUCTION
证据1｜引用标记：[2-3、2-4]｜可用引用标记：[2-3]、[2-4]
源内参考文献号：3, 4
原文句子：CP is most common in children, and the prevalence of CP in China is 0.68%.[3] Matsuo et al.[4] reported that the prevalence of CP in Japanese newborns was 2%–5%, decreasing to 0.3% by the age of 4–5 years.
上下文2｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：Although relatively rare, CP can also occur in adults and is called adult-acquired buried penis (AABP).
证据3｜引用标记：[2-5、2-6、2-7、2-8]｜可用引用标记：[2-5]、[2-6]、[2-7]、[2-8]
源内参考文献号：5, 6, 7, 8
原文句子：The most common cause is obesity, and the other causes include severe genital lymphoedema, genital sweatshirt and postcircumcision scar tissue hyperplasia.[5,6] Hyguchi et al.[7] reported that the obesity rates in adult males undergoing surgical treatment for CP can reach 87%, and as the obesity rates increase among adolescents, the prevalence of AABP is likely to increase as well.[8] Prolonged concealment of the penis within the skin can cause a series of physical and mental issues, such as abnormal penile development, urination difficulties, recurrent infections, sexual dysfunction, depression and low self-esteem;

---

参考数据源 2：Concealed penis_ A review of multilevel classification and surgical reconstruction techniques - Xiang - 2025 - BJUI Compass - Wiley Online Library.html
标题路径：1 INTRODUCTION
证据1｜引用标记：[2-9、2-10、2-11]｜可用引用标记：[2-9]、[2-10]、[2-11]
源内参考文献号：9, 10, 11
原文句子：therefore, timely and effective intervention is needed.[9-11] Although scientists have performed many studies on CP in recent years, there is no consensus on the classification, aetiology or treatment of CP, which has led to certain problems in clinical diagnosis and treatment.
上下文2｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：In this review, we propose to introduce the classification of CP, divide CP into congenital concealed penis (CCP) and AABP, and systematically describe the aetiology and pathogenesis of the two types of CP and the progress on diagnosis and surgical methods, with the aim to provide references and guidance for urologists and paediatric surgeons.

---

上下文1｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：There are many classification methods for CP, but there is controversy about which is the ideal method.
上下文2｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：However, it can be clearly stated that the appropriate subsequent treatment methods are closely related to the different subtypes.
证据3｜引用标记：[2-12]｜可用引用标记：[2-12]
源内参考文献号：12
原文句子：Crawford et al.[12] conducted their first systematic classification of buried penis based on clinical observations in 1977, using the degree of penile exposure as a distinguishing criterion.
上下文4｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：They classified buried penis into two types: fully buried penis and partially buried penis.
证据5｜引用标记：[2-13]｜可用引用标记：[2-13]
源内参考文献号：13
原文句子：Maizels et al.[13] considered buried penis and CP as different manifestations of the same disease and developed a detailed classification system for inconspicuous phallus from a pathological perspective.
上下文6｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：In addition to buried penis, this system also includes webbed penis, trapped penis, micropenis and diminutive penis.
证据7｜引用标记：[2-14]｜可用引用标记：[2-14]
源内参考文献号：14
原文句子：In 1999, Casale et al.[14] divided CP into three types based on pathology: Type 1, CCP;
上下文8｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：Type 2, CP due to scarring from a previous surgery;

原文句子：Several scientists[15] have classified CP into the following three subtypes from the aspects of concealment degree and morphology.

原文句子：From a morphological perspective,[16] CP can be divided into (1) patients with longer inner prepuce (LIP) only;

原文句子：and (3) patients who had, in addition to the above, excess suprapubic fat.

原文句子：Abnormal LIP and abnormal

源内参考文献号：16
原文句子：To standardize and better categorize patients with AABP (Table 2), Tausch et al.[16] initially proposed a classification system.
上下文2｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：Grade 1 patients have viable penile skin and required limited surgical intervention.
上下文3｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：Grade 2 patients do not have available penile skin and require a certain degree of skin grafting or reconstruction.
上下文4｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：Grade 3 patients have genital lymphoedema necessitating significant resection of diseased tissue and reconstructive procedures.
证据5｜引用标记：[2-16、2-17]｜可用引用标记：[2-16]、[2-17]
源内参考文献号：16, 17
原文句子：This particular grading system does not account for the extent of abdominal obesity.[16] Mirastschijski[17] proposed another classification system based on the location of the glans and penile shaft in relation to the adjacent tissue.
上下文6｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：In Type 1, the shaft is covered by excess tissue;
上下文7｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据

证据10｜引用标记：[2-18]｜可用引用标记：[2-18]

原文句子：Pariser et al.[18] presented a classification system based on their single-centre experience, and the types were graded according to the complexity of the surgical repair used for correction.
上下文11｜无源内参考文献号，不能单独作为引用依据
原文句子：In Type 1 patients, the penis needs to be removed with a local flap;

原文句子：Kevin et al.[20] proposed an improved AABP classification system based on the above studies, that is, the penis-abdominal-scrotum classification system, which divides AABP into 13 types according to seven major anatomical markers and governs follow-up diagnosis and treatment procedures according to this classification scheme.
